studyName: Oncogenomics of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors

tables.description: Sample ID, body site where sample was obtained, analyte type, tumor status of sample, and sequencing center of participants with malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors and involved in the "Oncogenomics of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors and involved in the "Oncogenomics of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use variable obtained from participants with malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors and involved in the "Oncogenomics of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Array_SNP: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, sex, and clinical annotation of tumor subtype of participants with malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors and involved in the "Oncogenomics of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors" project.

variables.name: clinical_annotation
variables.description: Clinical annotation of disease association or subtype
